mapper.select: SELECT id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, user_id, credit_score, credit_status FROM t_member_details WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_member_details SET credit_score = #{creditScore}, credit_status = #{creditStatus}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId}
